title: phlomoides azerbaijanica
intro: Phlomoides azerbaijanica, also known as Azerbaijani phlomoides, is a flowering plant species native to the Caucasus region. It is a medicinal plant with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems, making it a valuable remedy in folk medicine. Phlomoides azerbaijanica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal properties to be harnessed effectively.
